author: nhatnamtran
name: 30 Experiments: MLA + Pause Tokens + Eigenweight + 9 Novel Architectures
blurb: Systematic exploration of 30 experiments across 9 unorthodox architectures (eigenweight SVD, depth recurrence, SIREN weight generation, seed models, Hopfield attractors, NCA, hypernetworks, tensor networks, communicating agents) plus architecture research ideas (MLA, pause tokens, basis sharing, universal transformer + ACT). MLA latent=128 achieves 1.3223 BPB on 1xH100, nearly matching baseline with 4x KV compression.
